#Load libraries
```{r}
library(mrgsolve)   
library(magrittr)   
library(dplyr)       
library(ggplot2)    
library(FME)         
library(minpack.lm)  
library(reshape)     
library(truncnorm)   
library(EnvStats)    
library(invgamma)   
library(foreach)     
library(doParallel)  
library(bayesplot)  
library(FME) 
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
```

#Load in data
```{r}
## Build mrgsolve-based PBPK Model
library(mrgsolve) 
  micePBPK.code <- readRDS (file = "../Input/Chou and Lin input/micePBPK.RDS")
mod.mouse <- mcode ("micepbpk", micePBPK.code)


## Population mean (u)
theta.Mouse  = readRDS (file="../Input/Chou and Lin input/theta.Mouse.Rds")

## loading the theta names
theta.names       <- readRDS(file = "../Input/Chou and Lin input/theta.names.rds")
which_sig         <- grep("sig", theta.names)

```
##Wrap for multiple days and doses
```{r}
## Code from Chou et al modified to for loop

pred.mouse <- function(pars) {

  pars %<>% lapply(exp)

  BW <- 0.02 
  tinterval <- 24 
  day_vec   <- c(28, 56)
  dose_vec  <- c(0.166, 0.5, 1, 1.5)

  results_list <- list()
  counter <- 1
  
  for (TDoses in day_vec) {
    for (PDOSEoral in dose_vec) {
      
      DOSEoral <- PDOSEoral * BW 
      
      ex.oral <- ev(
        ID = 1,
        amt = DOSEoral,
        ii = tinterval,
        addl = TDoses - 1,
        cmt = "AST",
        replicate = FALSE
      )
      
  
      tsamp <- tgrid(0, tinterval * TDoses, 1)
       
      out <- mod.mouse %>% 
        param(pars) %>%
        Req(Plasma, Liver, Kidney, Aurine, Afeces) %>%
        update(atol = 1E-8, rtol = 1E-8, maxsteps = 5000) %>%
        mrgsim_d(data = ex.oral, tgrid = tsamp)
      
      out_df <- data.frame(
        Time   = out$time / 24,
        CA     = out$Plasma,
        CL     = out$Liver,
        CK     = out$Kidney,
        Curine = (out$Aurine / DOSEoral) * 100,
        Cfeces = (out$Afeces / DOSEoral) * 100,
        Days   = TDoses,
        Dose   = PDOSEoral
      )
      
      results_list[[counter]] <- out_df
      counter <- counter + 1
    }
  }
  
  final_out <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
  return(final_out)
}

Sim.fit.A = pred.mouse(pars = theta.Mouse)
df.sim.A  = cbind.data.frame (Time=Sim.fit.A$Time, 
                              CA=Sim.fit.A$CA, 
                              CL=Sim.fit.A$CL,
                              CK=Sim.fit.A$CK,
                              Curine=Sim.fit.A$Curine,
                              Cfeces=Sim.fit.A$Cfeces,
                              Days = Sim.fit.A$Days,
                              Dose = Sim.fit.A$Dose
                        )

#Extract max CA concentration on day 56
df.final_56 <- df.sim.A %>%
  filter(Days == 56,
         Time >= 55,
         Time <= 56) %>%
  group_by(Dose) %>%
  slice_max(CA, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

#Extract max CA concentration on day 28 
df.final_28 <- df.sim.A %>%
  filter(Days == 28,
         between(Time, 27, 28)) %>%
  group_by(Dose) %>%
  slice_max(CA, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

df.final <- rbind(df.final_28, df.final_56)

#making a control row 
zero_rows <- data.frame(
  Time   = c(56, 28),
  CA     = 0,
  CL     = 0,
  CK     = 0,
  Curine = 0,
  Cfeces = 0, 
  Days   = c(56, 28),
  Dose   = 0
)

df.final <- bind_rows(df.final, zero_rows)

mw_pfos <- 500.13  # g/mol for PFOS

#converting ug/g or ug/ml to uM assume 1g= 1mL
tissue_long <- df.final %>%
  select(Time, Dose, Days,
         CA, CL, CK,
         Curine, Cfeces) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = CA:Cfeces,
    names_to = "Compartment",
    values_to = "Concentration"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Concentration_uM = case_when(
      Compartment %in% c("CA", "CL", "CK") ~ (Concentration * 1000) / mw_pfos,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_   # urine and feces left NA for now
    )
  )
```

## Plot PBTK
```{r}
pfas_obs_all <- read.csv("../Output/observed_data.csv")

shape_map <- c(`Male` = 24, `Female` = 21)
custom_colors_named <- c(
  "0"     = "#330597",
  "0.166" = "#b12a90",
  "0.5"   = "#d35171",
  "1"     = "#f68f44",
  "1.5"   = "#fec029"
)

pfos_obs <- pfas_obs_all %>%
  filter(PFAS_type == "PFOS",
    Tissue != "Feces")

dose_vec <- unique(pfos_obs$Dose)
time_vec <- unique(pfos_obs$Time)
tissues_all <- c("Plasma", "Liver", "Kidney")
pfos_obs <- pfos_obs %>%
    mutate(uM = as.numeric(trimws(uM)),
    Tissue = factor(Tissue, levels = tissues_all)) 

tissues_all <- c("CA", "CL", "CK")
pbtk <- tissue_long %>%
   filter(!Compartment %in% c("Curine", "Cfeces")) %>%
  mutate(
    Tissue = factor(
      Compartment,
      levels = tissues_all,
      labels = c(
                 "Plasma", 
                 "Liver", 
                 "Kidney")
    )
  )


pfos_obs$Dose_Time <- paste0(pfos_obs$Dose, " (", pfos_obs$Time, ")")
pbtk$Dose_Time <- paste0(pbtk$Dose, " (", pbtk$Days, ")")
pbtk <- subset(pbtk, !(Dose_Time %in% c("0.166 (28)", "0.5 (28)", "1 (28)")))



#fold-change
obs_summary <- pfos_obs %>%
  group_by(Dose_Time, Sex, Tissue) %>%
  summarise(Mean_Obs = mean(uM, na.rm = TRUE))

pred_summary <- pbtk %>%
  group_by(Dose_Time, Tissue) %>%
  summarise(Mean_Pred = mean(Concentration_uM, na.rm = TRUE)) 
agreement <- left_join(obs_summary, pred_summary, by = c("Dose_Time")) %>%
  mutate(Fold_Diff = Mean_Obs / Mean_Pred)

plot_pfos <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(
  data = pred_summary ,
  aes(
    x = factor(Dose_Time),
    ymin = Mean_Pred / 5,
    ymax = Mean_Pred * 5,
    group = 1      # important for factors
  ),
  fill = "lightgrey",
  alpha = 0.2,
  inherit.aes = FALSE
) +
   geom_ribbon(
  data = pred_summary ,
  aes(
    x = factor(Dose_Time),
    ymin = Mean_Pred / 2,
    ymax = Mean_Pred * 2,
    group = 1      # important for factors
  ),
  fill = "darkgrey",
  alpha = 0.2,
  inherit.aes = FALSE
) + 
  geom_jitter(
    data = pfos_obs %>% filter(Time %in% c(28, 56)),
    aes(x = factor(Dose_Time), y = uM, shape = factor(Sex), color = factor(Dose), fill = factor(Dose)),
    size = 2, alpha = 0.5, width = 0.1, stroke = 1, 
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = pbtk %>% filter(Days %in% c(28, 56)),
    aes(x = factor(Dose_Time), y = Concentration_uM),
    fill = "red",color = "red", size = 2, 
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tissue, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Color",
    values = c(custom_colors_named)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Dose",
    values = custom_colors_named
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Sex",
    values = shape_map
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted vs Observed PFOS Concentrations (PBTK)",
    x = "Dose (mg/kg)",
    y = "PFOS Concentration (µM)"
  ) +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-10, 1600)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(size = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

plot_pfos
ggsave(filename = "../plots/pfos_chou.png", plot = plot_pfos, width = 12.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 300,bg = "white")

obs_vs_pred_table <- pfos_obs %>%
  inner_join(
    pbtk,
    by = c("Dose_Time", "Tissue")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    diff_uM      = Concentration_uM - uM,
    fold_diff    = Concentration_uM / uM,
    percent_diff = 100 * diff_uM / uM
  ) %>%
  select(
    Dose_Time,
    Tissue,
    Observed_uM  = uM,
    Predicted_uM = Concentration_uM,
    diff_uM,
    fold_diff,
    percent_diff
  ) %>%
  arrange(Tissue, desc(fold_diff))


tissue_summary <- obs_vs_pred_table %>%
  group_by(Tissue) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_diff_uM = mean(diff_uM, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_diff_uM = mean(diff_uM, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_fold  = mean(fold_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    times_lower = ifelse(mean_fold < 1, 1 / mean_fold, NA_real_),
    times_higher = ifelse(mean_fold > 1, mean_fold, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
tissue_summary

replicate_summary <- pfos_obs%>%
  group_by(Dose, Time, Tissue) %>%  
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
min_n <- min(replicate_summary$n)
max_n <- max(replicate_summary$n)
cat(sprintf("n = %d–%d mice/group\n", min_n, max_n))
```
